## GeoDraw PR Checklist

- [ ] Re-read `docs/codex/CONTRACT.md` before implementation and kept scope aligned
- [ ] Updated `docs/handoff.md` with done/next/risks for this PR
- [ ] Added/updated regression fixture or test (or documented why not)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:export` passes
- [ ] `npm run check:handoff` passes

## Scope
- Feature/fix:
- Files intentionally changed:
- Risky areas:

## Notes for Reviewer
- Determinism / branch-stability considerations:
- Fail-closed exporter behavior confirmed:
